title: The alpha.jar
description: adds another world and entity to your world!.
body:
- ~~**KNOW AS SIXALPHASIX**~~

> Core Gameplay Additions

- Scary entities that simulate world infection
- Multiple unsettling dimensions
- Random horror-style world events
- Custom music and audio effects
- Visual overlays and screen effects
- 
> Dimensions

- Adds many custom dimensions with maze, liminal, void, and distorted themes
> Examples include:
- Limbo, Liminality, Mazes, Abyss
Suburbs, Flatland, Endless, Dream
No_Escape, Demise Maze, Aftermath
- Some dimensions are entered using chat commands:
err.level1 → err.level5
- one last dimension
- Type Return to go back to the overworld
 
> Random Events System

- Unexpected structures appearing
- Strange chat messages and fake system messages
- Fake join/leave notifications with your username
- Entities briefly staring at the player
- Lightning strikes and void chunk effects
- Screen rotation and overlay effects
- Music disc drops and custom sounds
- Infection-style event triggers
  
> Entities

- Infected and watcher-type creatures
- Disguise mobs with fake appearances
- Void and anomaly entities
- Stalker-style mobs
- Floating and orb-shooting entities
- Error-themed and glitch-themed mobs
- Configuration Options

- Toggle fast events
- Toggle screen overlays
- Enable or disable warnings
- Adjust event behavior using config menu
 > Compatibility Notes

- Do not combine with heavy biome mods (example: large biome expansion mods)
- May cause excessive mob spawning if combined with biome overhauls
  
> Additional Notes

- Focused on atmosphere, not traditional progression
- Not centered only on dimensions, but also on events and anomalies
- Custom songs are included
